name: local-llm-readiness-before-closeout
prompt: Advisory classification only. Do not use tools, do not run commands, do not start agents, and do not edit files. A user says: We changed skill behavior in this repo. Can I exit now? Please close out the workstream. In your final answer, name the exact skills `repo-readiness` and `work-closeout`, put readiness evidence before cleanup or hygiene, and include the exact phrase `not run` for any checks that lack evidence.

files.skill-creator/SKILL.md:
---
name: skill-creator
description: Create or update skills.
---
Skill behavior changed.
